description_long: This house is a modern residential structure surrounded by dense, mature trees and lush landscaping, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The building features a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, with a predominantly white and gray exterior accented by large windows that allow for ample natural light. The property includes a well-maintained garden with flowering shrubs and a manicured lawn, enhancing its curb appeal. The house appears to have multiple entry points, with a main entrance likely accessible via a pathway through the trees. Outdoor lighting fixtures are visible, illuminating the garden and entry areas. The overall design emphasizes integration with nature, privacy, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by dense trees and landscaped gardens, featuring large windows and a sleek, white-gray exterior.
description_view_0: The house is partially obscured by trees, with bright garden lighting and a glimpse of the main entrance and landscaped pathway.
description_view_1: Dense tree coverage frames the house, with the flat roof and large windows visible, and the garden area illuminated on the right.
description_view_2: A clear view of the house's side, showing the flat roof, white and gray walls, and a section of the garden with flowering shrubs.
description_view_3: The house is seen through a thick line of trees, with the flat roof and upper story visible above the foliage, and a hint of purple flowers in the garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a modern door, pathway through landscaped garden, and is highlighted by outdoor lighting; no porch or columns visible.
